meaning: n.(印度教高僧的)修行的处所,聚会所,嬉皮群居村
examples: In India she joined an ashram and meditated.
In Italy she ate and learned the language; in India she joined an ashram and meditated.
But after living with Mahatma Gandhi in his ashram in the mid-1940s, something had happened to him.
The German Bakery is near the Osho Ashram, a mystic centre popular with visitors to Pune.
There is no question of their staying at the ashram for a required two weeks.
